metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for working with thai food & recipes

plugins.name: ahaan-thai-mcp-servers
plugins.description: Adds the ahaan-thai.de mcp servers to your project

plugins.name: thai-food-dictionary
plugins.description: Adds thai food dictionary skills to your project

plugins.name: thai-food-encyclopedia
plugins.description: Adds the thai food encyclopedia mcp server to your project

plugins.name: thai-cook-book-library
plugins.description: Adds the thai cookbook library mcp server to your project

plugins.name: thai-tools
plugins.description: Adds some thai skills and commands to your project
